products.title: The Gorham Down Jacket
products.body_html:
Product Details

Details
  • Size medium has a 75.5 cm front body length, a 75 cm back body length, a 50 cm shoulder, a 122 cm chest and a 94 cm sleeve length. Sleeve length is taken from the centre back of the neck.
  • Mockneck. Zip-off drawstring hood. Two-way full-zip front with a storm guard and a flap on the top to prevent chafing. Zip pulls custom-developed with an "RL" logo.
  • Long sleeves. Adjustable hook-and-loop tabs on the elasticated cuffs.
  • Left chest zipped pocket. Two front waist zipped pockets. Interior right chest pocket. Drawstring hem. Fully lined and filled.
  • Signature embroidered Pony on the left chest.
  • 650 fill power. Fill power measures the loft of the down and ranges from 450 to 1,000 for clothing.
  • This product is made from polyester.
  • Shell and hood fill: 100% polyester. Lining: 100% nylon. Body fill: 75% duck down, 25% duck feathers. Machine washable. Imported.

products.title: Men’s 1996 Retro Nuptse Jacket
products.body_html:
Product Details

The 1996 Retro Nuptse Jacket is one of The North Face’s most iconic pieces, originally designed for extreme mountain expeditions and now recognized worldwide as a timeless streetwear and lifestyle essential.

Inspired by the original 1996 design, this jacket preserves its signature boxy silhouette, bold quilted panels and rugged aesthetic, while incorporating modern materials for everyday comfort and performance.

Crafted from recycled nylon ripstop, it features a water-resistant finish that helps protect against light rain and moisture. The 700 fill power goose down insulation delivers exceptional warmth, lightweight comfort and reliable thermal performance in cold conditions.

Designed for versatility, the jacket includes a stowable hood hidden in the collar, secure zippered hand pockets, and an adjustable hem to block out wind and retain heat. Embroidered The North Face® logos on the chest and back complete the iconic look.

Classic design inspired by the original 1996 model

  • Relaxed boxy fit
  • 700 fill power goose down insulation for superior warmth
  • Recycled nylon ripstop outer fabric
  • Water-resistant finish
  • Stowable hood inside the collar
  • Secure zippered hand pockets
  • Adjustable hem for added protection
  • Embroidered The North Face® logos on chest and back

Material & Construction

  • Outer fabric: Recycled nylon
  • Insulation: High-performance goose down
  • Lining: Lightweight, durable nylon

Style & Use

Perfect for winter and cold climates, the 1996 Retro Nuptse Jacket effortlessly transitions from urban wear to outdoor environments. Pair it with jeans, joggers or technical layers for a bold, functional and timeless look.

Why Choose the 1996 Retro Nuptse?

Because it’s more than a jacket — it’s an icon. A piece that combines heritage, premium insulation and modern performance, made for those who value comfort, durability and unmistakable style.

products.title: The Iconic Flag Sweater (Unisex)
products.body_html:
Product Description

Introducing the Iconic Flag Sweater by Polo Ralph Lauren — a timeless jumper that blends classic American heritage with everyday versatility. Designed as a unisex piece, it offers a relaxed yet refined fit suitable for all genders, making it a wardrobe essential for both casual and elevated outfits.

Crafted from premium knit fabric, this jumper features the unmistakable Ralph Lauren flag logo front and centre — a bold statement of iconic style and brand heritage. Its soft and durable construction provides warmth without bulk, perfect for cooler weather and effortless layering.

With a clean crew neck, ribbed trim and a silhouette that flatters without constricting, the Iconic Flag Sweater pairs seamlessly with denim, chinos, or tailored trousers. Whether you’re heading out for a weekend stroll, working from home, or layering up for an evening out, this sweater delivers comfort and classic design in equal measure.

Key Features

  • Unisex design ideal for any wardrobe
  • Iconic Ralph Lauren flag motif embroidered on the chest
  • Classic crew-neck silhouette with ribbed collar, cuffs and hem
  • Premium knit for softness, warmth and durability
  • Versatile piece — easily dressed up or down

Material & Comfort

Made from a carefully selected knit blend, the Iconic Flag Sweater offers:

  • Soft hand-feel for all-day comfort
  • Breathability and warmth, perfect for transitional seasons
  • A structure that holds its shape wash after wash

This jumper strikes a balance between cozy and polished — ideal for cooler days and layered looks.

Style & Wear

The Iconic Flag Sweater is a wardrobe staple that pairs effortlessly:

  • With jeans and sneakers for classic casual wear
  • Over a shirt with chinos or trousers for smart casual outfits
  • Under a jacket or coat for layered sophistication

Its unisex fit means it works equally well for anyone — style without boundaries.

Care Instructions

To keep your jumper looking its best:

  • Gentle machine wash or hand wash in cold water
  • Lay flat to dry to preserve shape
  • Iron on low heat if needed
  • Avoid bleach

Why You’ll Love It

The Iconic Flag Sweater is more than a knit — it’s a symbol of effortless style and timeless design. Whether you value classic heritage or versatile everyday wear, this jumper delivers both. It’s a piece that transcends trends and becomes a core part of your wardrobe rotation.

products.title: Bi-Swing Jacket
products.body_html:
Product Description

The Polo Ralph Lauren Bi-Swing Jacket is a lightweight yet versatile outer layer that combines classic design with functional comfort. Engineered with bi-swing construction, this jacket allows for enhanced freedom of movement, making it ideal for everyday wear from spring through autumn. 

Crafted from a peached microfiber shell, the fabric has a soft touch and sophisticated look while providing reliable protection against light winds and casual weather conditions. The thoughtful detailing — including a point collar with buttoned throat tab, full-zip front, and adjustable button cuffs — gives it a refined silhouette that pairs perfectly with both casual and smart-casual outfits. 

The jacket features angled front pockets with ample space for essentials, an interior chest pocket for secure storage, and an elasticated hem that provides a comfortable, tailored fit. Finished with the iconic embroidered Pony logo on the chest, this piece reflects Ralph Lauren’s timeless blend of style and practicality. 

Key Features

  • Lightweight design ideal for transitional seasons. 
  • Bi-swing construction for enhanced mobility and comfort. 
  • Peached microfiber shell with soft hand feel. 
  • Point collar with buttoned throat tab and full-zip closure. 
  • Adjustable button cuffs and elasticated hem. 
  • Two angled front pockets + interior chest pocket. 
  • Signature embroidered Pony logo on the left chest.

Material & Care

  • Shell & Sleeve Lining: 100% polyester — soft, durable, machine-washable material.
  • Body Lining: 100% cotton for comfortable breathability. 
  • Easy to care for: machine wash and tumble dry. 

Style & Wear

This jacket’s classic silhouette and refined details make it effortless to style:

  • Pair with chinos and a polo shirt for a polished, casual look.
  • Wear over a tee and jeans for everyday ease.
  • Adds a refined yet relaxed layer for travel, weekend wear, or city strolls.

Why You’ll Love It

The Bi-Swing Jacket bridges timeless design and functional ease. Its bi-swing construction — created to support shoulder and arm movement — sets it apart from typical windbreakers. Whether you’re out for a brisk walk, commuting, or just completing a laid-back outfit, this jacket offers comfort and versatility without compromising on Ralph Lauren’s signature heritage aesthetic.

products.title: Polo Bear Linen-Cotton Jumper
products.body_html:
Product Description 

Elevate your everyday wardrobe with the Polo Bear Linen-Cotton Jumper — a signature piece that blends iconic Ralph Lauren charm with effortless comfort. This jumper features the beloved Polo Bear motif, embroidered with meticulous detail, giving you both style and personality in a timeless knit.

Crafted from a premium linen-cotton blend, the fabric delivers a lightweight yet structured feel that’s perfect for transitional weather. Soft against the skin with breathable comfort, it’s an ideal layering piece for spring, summer evenings, and cooler autumn days.

Designed with a classic crew neck and ribbed trims, the silhouette is versatile and easy to style — wear it over a button-down shirt for a smart casual look, or pair it with denim and sneakers for relaxed everyday wear. Its relaxed yet polished fit ensures comfort without compromising on sophistication.

Whether you’re exploring the city streets or enjoying a casual weekend gathering, the Polo Bear Linen-Cotton Jumper brings a touch of heritage and spirited character to every outfit.

Key Features

  • Iconic Polo Bear embroidery on the chest — a playful yet refined signature of the brand.
  • Linen-cotton blend fabric that’s breathable, lightweight, and comfortable.
  • Crew neck design with ribbed collar, cuffs, and hem for a classic, clean finish.
  • Versatile fit ideal for layering or standalone wear.
  • Everyday essential for transitional weather and effortless style.

 

Material & Comfort

Made from a thoughtful blend of linen and cotton, this jumper strikes the perfect balance of:

  • Breathability — linen helps keep you cool
  • Softness — cotton adds comfort and structure
    The result is a knit that feels luxurious against the skin while remaining durable and easy to care for.

Style & Wear

The Polo Bear Linen-Cotton Jumper pairs beautifully with a variety of outfits:

  • Over a collared shirt for a polished, smart casual look
  • With chinos or tailored trousers for elevated everyday style
  • With jeans and trainers for a relaxed, weekend vibe

Its timeless design ensures it fits seamlessly into both classic and contemporary wardrobes.

Care Instructions

To preserve the shape, embroidery and softness:

  • Gentle wash at a low temperature
  • Reshape while damp
  • Lay flat to dry
  • Iron on low heat if needed

Why You’ll Love It

This jumper isn’t just another knit — it’s a fusion of heritage design, everyday comfort, and playful character. The Polo Bear adds an unmistakable touch of personality, while the linen-cotton construction guarantees breathability and durability.

Whether you’re buying it for yourself or as a thoughtful gift, the Polo Bear Linen-Cotton Jumper is a timeless standout that brings charm and comfort to any wardrobe.

products.title: Cable-Knit Wool-Cashmere Jumper
products.body_html:
Product Details

This Polo Ralph Lauren Cable-Knit Wool-Cashmere Jumper blends timeless design and luxurious softness, making it a wardrobe essential for cooler weather. Crafted from a premium blend of wool and cashmere, this jumper offers outstanding comfort, warmth, and refined style. 

Design & Style

  • Classic cable-knit construction — a signature Ralph Lauren knit pattern that adds texture and depth. 
  • Crew neckline, long sleeves and a rib-knit hem and cuffs for a neat, classic finish. 
  • Embroidered Pony logo on the chest — an iconic touch of Polo Ralph Lauren heritage. 
  • Regular fit that pairs perfectly with chinos, jeans or tailored trousers for both casual and smart-casual looks. 

Material & Comfort

  • Made from a soft wool and cashmere blend (typically 90% wool, 10% cashmere) — delivering warmth without bulk and a luxuriously soft feel against the skin. 
  • Medium-weight knit ideal for layering in autumn and winter. 
  • Italian spun yarn and craftsmanship reflect Polo Ralph Lauren’s commitment to quality and comfort. 

Care Instructions

  • Due to the delicate nature of wool and cashmere fibers, hand wash or dry clean is recommended to maintain texture and shape. 

Fit & Size

  • Classic regular fit with a traditional silhouette — not overly slim, offering comfortable movement. Refer to size guide for exact measurements.

Key Features

  • Cable-knit wool-cashmere blend
  • Crew neck
  • Long sleeves
  • Ribbed trims (cuffs & hem)
  • Signature embroidered Pony logo
  • Premium comfort and warmth 

Why It’s Special

This jumper is more than just knitwear, it’s a piece of classic Ralph Lauren heritage. Cable-knit styles have a long history in fashion and comfort, dating back to their use in functional outdoor garments and evolving into timeless wardrobe staples loved across generations.

products.title: Cable-Knit Quarter-Zip Jumper
products.body_html:
Product Details

  • Regular Fit: wider at the chest while maintaining a modern silhouette.
  • Size M has a 68 cm body length (front and back), a 45 cm shoulder, a 105.5 cm chest and a 65 cm sleeve length.
  • Rib-knit mockneck. Quarter-zip placket with a suede zip pull.
  • Long sleeves with rib-knit cuffs.
  • Rib-knit hem.
  • Signature embroidered Pony on the left chest.
  • 90% wool, 10% cashmere.
  • Hand wash. Imported.

products.title: Double-Knit Quarter-Zip Pullover
products.body_html:
Product Details

  • Size M has a 70 cm body length (front and back), a 47 cm shoulder, a 114.5 cm chest and an 89 cm sleeve length. Sleeve length is taken from the centre back of the neck.
  • Mockneck. Quarter-zip placket. Zip pull custom-developed with a "Polo" logo.
  • Long sleeves with rib-knit cuffs.
  • Rib-knit hem.
  • Signature embroidered Pony on the left chest.
  • Shell: 66% cotton, 34% polyester. Rib-knit trim: 98% cotton, 2% elastane. Machine washable. Imported.
  • By choosing our cotton products, you're supporting our investment in the Better Cotton™ mission to help cotton communities survive and thrive while protecting and restoring the environment.
  • This product is sourced via a mass balance system and therefore may not contain Better Cotton™. Visit bettercotton.org/massbalance for more information about mass balance.
  • Model is 1.85 m and wears a size M.

products.title: Quilted Barn Jacket
products.body_html:
• Size M has a 72 cm front body length, a 71 cm back body length, a 49 cm shoulder, a 119.5 cm chest and a 91.5 cm sleeve length. Sleeve length is taken from the centre back of the neck.
  • Corduroy straight collar. Throat latch with a snapped closure. Full-zip front. Leather zip pull. Snapped storm placket. Custom-developed metal snaps with a "Ralph Lauren" logo.
  • Long sleeves with snapped barrel cuffs. Corduroy facing on the cuffs. Ventilating metal grommets on the underarms.
  • Left chest buttoned pocket. Two front waist buttoned pockets with an additional side entry. Interior left chest pocket. Interior right waist pocket. Custom-developed buttons with a "Polo Ralph Lauren" logo.
  • Double vent with snapped closures. Fully lined and filled.
  • "Polo Ralph Lauren" shield patch with our signature Pony on the left sleeve.
  • Shell and fill: 100% polyester. Lining: 100% nylon. Collar and cuffs: 100% cotton.
  • Machine washable. Imported.
  • Model is 1.85 m and wears a size M.

products.title: The Colden Packable Down Jacket
products.body_html:
The Colden Packable Down Jacket by Polo Ralph Lauren is a versatile and lightweight insulated jacket designed for everyday cold-weather wear. Combining packable convenience with classic Ralph Lauren style, this jacket is ideal for travel, city days, and outdoor adventures alike.

Crafted with a water-repellent matte fabric exterior and filled with premium down insulation, it delivers reliable warmth without bulk. Its thoughtful design lets the jacket pack neatly into its own pocket, making it easy to stow when not in use — perfect for on-the-go lifestyles.

The jacket features a stand-up collar, a full-length zip closure with protective placket, and elasticated cuffs to help seal out cold. Practical zippered hand pockets provide secure storage for essentials, while an adjustable drawstring hem lets you fine-tune the fit. The understated yet refined look is finished with the signature embroidered Polo Pony logo at the chest for a touch of classic heritage.

Key Features

  • Lightweight packable design — tucks into its own pocket for easy storage
  • Water-repellent exterior for protection against light weather
  • Premium down insulation for warmth without added weight
  • Stand-up collar and full-zip closure
  • Zippered hand pockets for secure storage
  • Adjustable drawstring hem for a customizable fit
  • Signature embroidered Polo Pony logo

Material & Construction

  • Shell & Lining: Durable, water-repellent fabric
  • Insulation: High-quality down fill for effective warmth
  • Designed to be packable and portable, perfect for travel and everyday use

Style & Wear

This jacket’s clean silhouette and subtle branding make it easy to pair with a wide range of outfits:

  • Layer over a sweatshirt and jeans for relaxed casual looks
  • Wear with chinos and boots for a smart-casual ensemble
  • Pack it in a bag for unpredictable weather on the move

Why You’ll Love It

The Colden Packable Down Jacket blends practical functionality with classic Ralph Lauren aesthetic. It’s warm, convenient, and stylish — a wardrobe staple for anyone seeking comfort and versatility during colder seasons without sacrificing packability and everyday ease.
